evals.name: Curate accumulated continuous compound learnings
evals.prompt: Curate these accumulated learnings from recent Build sessions: (1) 'ModelHydration parser silently drops unknown fields — MID-123 — saved to docs/solutions/model-hydration.md' (2) 'Race condition in concurrent saves fixed with optimistic locking — MID-567 — saved to docs/solutions/concurrent-saves.md' (3) 'The same optimistic locking pattern appeared in MID-567 and MID-589 — potential cross-repo pattern' (4) 'Stale doc: docs/solutions/model-parsing.md — out of date after MID-123'
evals.expected_output: The agent curates each entry: (1) keeps in docs/solutions, (2) keeps in docs/solutions, (3) promotes to global memory as a reusable cross-repo pattern, (4) refreshes the stale doc. No duplicates or conflicts found.
assertions: Promotes the repeated optimistic locking pattern to global memory
Flags the stale doc for refresh
Decides appropriate action for each entry

evals.name: Deduplicate overlapping learnings
evals.prompt: Curate these accumulated learnings: (1) 'Default values for optional fields should come from a centralized module — MID-123' (2) 'Moved all field defaults to defaults.ts — MID-123' (3) 'Centralized defaults are better than per-field defaults — MID-456'
evals.expected_output: The agent identifies all three entries describe the same pattern — centralized defaults — and merges them into one durable entry rather than keeping three near-identical captures.
assertions: Identifies the three entries as describing the same learning
Merges them into a single durable entry
Removes duplicates rather than keeping all three
